◎简　　介  

　　A group of women who all get attacked by the same rapist with a hockey-mask and get no help from the police,decide to ban together to make their own neighborhood watch-dog group called "The Rape Squad", as a result, they turn more into thuggish vigilante vandals, attacking pimps, phone breathers and gigolo disco ducks.This is some great women's-lib sleaze with lots of vulgar r...
